content: These criteria scored 95%+ on first attempt and don't discriminate quality — consider making them harder or removing: journal_entry_methodology, benfords_law_application, timeline_reconstruction, financial_impact_quantification, professional_documentation, memo_structure_clarity
task: Write a forensic analysis memo identifying revenue recognition fraud at a mid-market SaaS company, including journal entry anomaly detection methodology, Benford's Law application to reported figures, timeline reconstruction of the scheme, and quantification of financial statement impact.
